title: And Now Miguel
writer: Jane Klove, Joseph Krumgold, Ted Sherdeman
actors: Pat Cardi, Michael Ansara, Guy Stockwell
plot: Based on the popular novel by Joseph Krumgold, "...And Now Miguel" is an easygoing yarn about a small boy with a big dream. Miguel (Pat Cardi), a shepherd's son, dreams of one day assuming responsibility for the flocks of sheep th...
